title: elatine major subsp. macropoda
intro: Elatine major subsp. macropoda, also known as Elatine, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Elatine and is a type of waterwort. It is a perennial aquatic plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatine include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Elatine can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
